ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of experiment (foreign key to experiment_types) */,
  "algorithm" INTEGER /* RL algorithm used (foreign key to algorithms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the experiment */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the experiment is run (e.g., AWS, local server) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES experiment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent type (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., DQN, PPO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the algorithm is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the run belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "experiment_version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment code */,
  "environment_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the environment (e.g., hardware specifications) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., reward, episode length) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, points) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES experiment_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, batch size) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter (e.g., float, integer) */,
  "is_tunable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the hyperparameter is tunable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the version */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message of the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the code */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_content" TEXT /* Content of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., JSON, YAML) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the experiment was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., reward, episode length) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the result belongs to */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., final, interim) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES experiment_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
